symptom: Short, search-friendly description of the alert/error. Include service name, error type, and key symptoms. E.g. 'Pod CrashLoopBackOff OOMKilled payment-service high memory usage'
root_cause: What actually caused it. E.g. 'Memory limit too low after traffic spike from marketing campaign'
fix_steps: Step 1: e.g. Increase memory limit from 512Mi to 1Gi in deployment manifest
Step 2: e.g. Apply updated manifest with kubectl apply -f
Step 3: e.g. Verify pod stabilizes with kubectl get pods -w
